note: Human watcher/evaluation data only. Robot-facing compact logs do not read this file.

summary.note: The watcher loops generated frames. The robot-facing logs see compact streams only; hidden truth is evaluation data.

rules.lesson: overhead clearance plus vertical echo pressure means duck or probe before committing upper body height
foot warning plus pitch pressure may mean a drop or ledge, so probe before committing body weight
